text: Ayaka enjoys elegant arts such as gagaku music, poetry, the game of Go, and dance.
Ayaka's favorite Inazuman food is ochazuke, and she is deeply interested in foreign cuisine despite rarely having the chance to try it.
Ayaka finds animal fats and offal somewhat difficult to accept.
Although Ayaka has full mastery certification in the Kamisato Art of swordsmanship, she continues training diligently every day.
Ayaka and Ayato enjoy ordering common dishes from Kiminami Restaurant to eat together at the Kamisato Estate.
After meals and tea, Ayaka often plays the game of Go to refresh her mind.
Ayaka enjoys closing her eyes and feeling the wind because she finds it calming and comfortable.
Unlike most people, Ayaka sees beauty in withered cherry trees because they remind her of spring blossoms, and she wishes to see them bloom once more.
Ayaka prefers dance fans and tea ceremony fans over ordinary summer or throwing fans.
As a child, Ayaka loved playing with a colorful temari ball named Tokomaru and would hum nursery rhymes while playing.
After growing up and becoming responsible, Ayaka stopped playing with Tokomaru and carefully stored it away as a treasured childhood memory.
Ayaka possesses a Cryo Vision that allows her to wield the power of ice.
Ayaka's swordsmanship combines swift and elegant Cryo-enhanced attacks refined through countless hours of training.
Ayaka incorporates her own philosophy of the 'heart of the sword' into the Kamisato Art, moving like a white crane dancing through snow.
Besides swordsmanship, Ayaka also understands how to refine and care for high-quality weapons.
